content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally with Nifty +0.52%, Pharma +2.54%, IT +2.03%, Metals +1.81% leading. VIX down 4.46% to 18.83 indicates easing fear. Book is 49% deployed with most positions in green; focus shifts to position management and selective adds in confirmed momentum names while avoiding chasing extended moves.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Recovered from -2.6% to -0.1% intraday. Strong Q4 print (+35% PAT, GNPA 1.45%) and PSU bank sector strength intact. SL at 77.50 still appropriate; no reason to tighten yet given <2% gain. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6% with strong fundamentals (NPA <1%, ICICI Sec target Rs 1350). Current SL 1035.47 is above entry — already protected. Loosening to 1015 would VIOLATE tighten-only rule. Keep SL at 1035.47 (above entry, locks ~5% gain). Actually current SL is already optimal — re-classifying as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.4%. Hedge thesis intact; gold consolidating after big FY26 run. SL at 119 (~5% below CMP) appropriate for ETF volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1395.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock at 52-week high after blockbuster Q4 (+27% PAT, +22.6% revenue). Current SL 1418 is essentially at entry — too tight, risk of getting stopped on normal pullback. Loosening from 1418 to 1395 would VIOLATE tighten-only rule. Keep current SL. Reclassify as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 694.48,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Already at +3% with SL above entry (694.48). Q4 results in 2 days (Apr 29) — binary event risk. SL already locks gain. No change needed; this is HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "At -1.1%, Q4 results in 3 days (Apr 30) — binary event approaching. SL 2260 (3.6% below entry) gives room. FMCG sector showing rotation back. Hold through earnings catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%, near 52-week high (407.25). Trail SL up to entry (404.50) from 401 to lock breakeven as stock pushes past previous high. Tightening only — compliant with rules. Power sector momentum strong, Q4 results May 15 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT at 443 placed 356m ago. Stock has likely moved away. Letting the existing order remain rather than stacking duplicates. Power cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER consideration) — already have NTPC exposure. Will not add fresh order."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 55,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 878.00,
      "stop_loss": 850.00,
      "target": 935.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround: return to profit, NII +43.4% YoY, NIM expansion, microfinance stress easing. Stock broke above SMA20 (818) and approaching SMA50 (868). Bullish engulfing on Apr 22. Risk: 28pts (3.2%) | Reward: 57pts (6.5%) | R:R 1:2.0. Position size ~4.8% of capital — appropriate for 0.62 confidence (sub-0.7 cap at 5%). Risk budget: 4.8% × 3.2% = 0.15% — well within 0.5% per-name. Bank exposure check: no other private bank holdings."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 75,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 612.00,
      "stop_loss": 590.00,
      "target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (+67.6% PAT), interim dividend Rs 11/share with record date Apr 30 — 3 days away, creates near-term demand. LME zinc up 20-25% YoY. Risk: 22pts (3.6%) | Reward: 48pts (7.8%) | R:R 1:2.2. Position ~4.6% of capital. Risk budget: 4.6% × 3.6% = 0.17% — compliant. Short hold to capture dividend catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Stock +8.94% on Organon $11.75B deal — but research flags BEARISH on leverage/integration concerns and analyst skepticism. Move likely overdone in single session; chasing into +9% gap is poor R:R. Wait for consolidation."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Up 6.62% to new 52-week high with vertical move. Already have NTPC in power cluster. Adding TORNTPOWER would create theme concentration. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "ED PMLA search Apr 24 — active money laundering investigation. Bounce today is dead-cat post-selloff. Avoid regulatory overhang."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ALKEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "CEO resigned Apr 24, transition until Jun 30 — leadership uncertainty. Capex doubling at Ujjain signals cost overrun. Avoid despite pharma sector strength."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "UTIAMC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 swung to net loss, FY26 PAT -45%. 6.3x volume could be capitulation buying after -11% drop on results day, but fundamentals weak. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "IDFCFIRSTB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Chandigarh fraud overhang, ROE only 3.46%, token dividend signals capital conservation. Adding INDUSINDBK already covers private bank turnaround thesis."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recovered intraday, thesis intact, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1035.47 already above entry, locks ~5% gain. No further tightening needed yet — let it run toward 1100 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL at 119 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already at breakeven, locks any gain. Let it ride into 1480 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 694.48 already above entry. Q4 in 2 days — binary risk; current SL well-placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 3 days; need room for normal volatility into earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to entry (breakeven) from 401 as stock pushes to new 52-week highs. Locks zero risk."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TORNTPOWER, SUNPHARMA — wait for consolidation post vertical moves before considering entry. UTIAMC — watch for stabilization above 950 and improved Q1 commentary. AXISBANK — wait for support at 1050 zone and signs of reversal before considering value entry.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 49% deployed, +0.36% on day, cumulative +0.5%. Adding ~9% more in INDUSINDBK + HINDZINC takes deployment to ~58% — within limits. Risk budget per name compliant. Two binary earnings events upcoming: GRANULES (Apr 29), HINDUNILVR + NESTLEIND already reported. Power cluster managed: only NTPC core, TATAPOWER pending order may not fill. Pharma exposure: GRANULES + new HINDZINC (metals) provide sector diversity. Maintaining minimum 20% cash buffer (~30% will remain after fills)."
}
